title: Treatment of valley fever (coccidioidomycosis) - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of valley fever (coccidioidomycosis)
Learn how valley fever is diagnosed and how it is treated.
- How is valley fever diagnosed?
- How is valley fever treated?

## How is valley fever diagnosed?
Valley fever is diagnosed based on:
- a physical examination

## How is valley fever treated?
For many people, the disease usually goes away on its own without any treatment. The symptoms can last weeks to months.
Your health care provider may give you antifungal medications if you:
- have symptoms that are severe or do not improve
- are at higher risk of complications
